nodes.description: Screenshot demonstrating the usage of the NotebookLM skill. It shows an AI assistant querying a Suzuki GSR 600 workshop manual in NotebookLM for fluid and torque specifications, and then adding the notebook to the user's library.
A skill that enables querying documents in NotebookLM and managing the NotebookLM library, e.g., using scripts like auth_manager.py, ask_question.py, and notebook_manager.py.
